name: sales-opportunity-api-service
description: API skeleton for sales opportunity advisor

scripts.start:rag: cd rag-service && if [ -x .venv/bin/python ]; then .venv/bin/python rag_search_server.py; else python3 rag_search_server.py; fi
scripts.rag:health: node -e "const host=process.env.RAG_SEARCH_HOST||'127.0.0.1'; const port=process.env.RAG_SEARCH_PORT||19104; fetch('http://'+host+':'+port+'/health').then(async r=>{const t=await r.text(); console.log(t); process.exit(r.ok?0:1);}).catch(e=>{console.error(e.message); process.exit(1);});"
scripts.rag:install: cd rag-service && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.check: npm run check:structure && npm run lint:platform-configs
scripts.regression:no-openclaw: OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_TOKEN= NO_OPENCLAW_REQUIRED=1 LANGGRAPH_LEGACY_FALLBACK_ENABLED=0 LANGGRAPH_DRAFT_MODE=compat node scripts/run_self_contained_regression.js --no-openclaw
